scripts.deploy: gcloud functions deploy load-file-to-bigquery --gen2 --entry-point loadFileToBigQuery --runtime nodejs24 --trigger-location BUCKET_LOCATION --trigger-event-filters="type=google.cloud.storage.object.v1.finalized" --trigger-event-filters="bucket=BUCKET_NAME" --env-vars-file .env.prod.yaml --region europe-west2
